com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo

Class Supply.RawElabelData

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo.Supply.RawElabelData
  • Enclosing class:
    Supply
    Deprecated. 
    API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
    • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
    • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
    • Supply.getProductNumber()
    • Supply.getSerialNumber()
    • Supply.getDescription()
    • Supply.getMarkerColor()
    • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
    • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
    • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
    "

    @Deprecated
public class Supply.RawElabelData
extends java.lang.Object
    Retrieves RawElabelData information
    Since:
    API 5

public java.lang.String getCartridgeMemoryTagData1()
        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer supported. It will be return null."
        Retrieves Cartridge Memory Tag Data1

        CartridgeMemoryTagData1
        • Return can be null if the value for CartridgeMemoryTagData1 is null

        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer supported. It will be return null."
        Retrieves Elabel Mask

        • Return can be null if the value for ElabelMask is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for ElabelMask is empty
        Since:
